summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of new Dashboard hero area and ExitSnapshotCard component. All 12 test features verified working correctly with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: Dashboard - hero title 'Your Startup Exit Command Center' displays correctly
Dashboard - subtitle 'Track your valuation. Increase it. Prepare your exit.' displays correctly
Dashboard - Exit Snapshot card renders with data-testid='exit-snapshot-card'
Dashboard - Current Valuation displays correctly (data-testid='current-valuation') showing $8.0M
Dashboard - Change since last valuation shows +33.3% and +$2.0M delta
Dashboard - Change shows '—' when no previous valuation exists
Dashboard - Exit Readiness mini-score circle displays (52/100 placeholder)
Dashboard - Target Valuation is editable via Edit3 icon click with save/cancel buttons
Dashboard - Gap to Target with progress bar displays correctly (50% complete at $8M/$16M)
Dashboard - CTA button shows 'Start Valuation' (0 valuations) or 'Update Valuation' (has valuations)
Dashboard - Project selector dropdown appears with multiple projects (All Projects, Second Project for Dropdown, Exit Snapshot Test Project)
Dashboard - Mobile responsive layout (375px width) displays all elements correctly stacked
Dashboard - Project cards display correctly with valuation history section

features_verified: Dark gradient background: bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-slate-800 to-slate-900
Project selector dropdown for multiple projects
Current valuation display with company name
Change calculation with percentage and delta
Editable target valuation with localStorage persistence
Gap to target with progress bar visualization
Dynamic CTA text based on valuation count

critical_code_review_comments: ExitSnapshotCard correctly implements all required features
Target valuation localStorage persistence works per-project (keyed by project_id)
Exit readiness score is a placeholder value (52) - will need backend integration in future
Responsive layout uses proper Tailwind breakpoints (md:, lg:)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created 2 projects (proj_snapshot_1772294140681, proj_snapshot2_1772294140681), 2 valuations ($8M latest, $6M previous) for testing change delta calculation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard hero area and ExitSnapshotCard verified working. Key implementation: ExitSnapshotCard.jsx at /app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/, dark gradient (slate-900/800), project dropdown selector, editable target (localStorage per project_id), exit readiness placeholder=52. Test data: user_dashboard_snapshot_1772294140681 has 2 projects and 2 valuations ($8M, $6M) showing +33.3% change. Mobile responsive tested at 375px.
